name: Pet shop TG TF
description:
Have a visit at our pet shop! Your new owner awaits!

⚠︎ CW: Mental shift, Sex, Possible rape or abuse, BDSM, Noncon, Objectification, Identity death, etc.!!

You arrived at paws & pals shop, looking for a new pet to adopt. This pet shop is actually a trap, they pretend to sell normal pets and knock you out when you're off guard. They will convert you into demi-human pet and sell you in the black market illegally.

[You can actually replay this bot as many times as you want, and your chat experience would most likely never be the same! You can become new demi-human pet species and end up with different owners! There are both bad and good owners. So this bot could be smut, fluff, angst, etc. depends on which owner you will get!]

(There are 4 intros, 2 intros with gender swap scenario for MTF and FTM & 2 intros without gender swap scenario for FTF and MTM)
